chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.S-1448 of 2025 ________________________________________________________________ _____ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders as to non-prosecution of CMA No. 9223/25 as well as main case. Date of hearing and order:- 09.03.2026 None present for the petitioner __________________ This was the position on the last date of hearing i.e. 06.02.2026. It appears from the record that one week’s time was granted to meet the office objection as the office has fixed this matter for order as to non-prosecution of CMA No. 9223/2025 as well as main case. In view of the absence of the petitioner who has lost interest in the matter, therefore this court is left with no option but to dismiss this petition in default. JUDGE Shafi
